content.question: Do small depopulating villages (under 3,000 inhabitants) retain any formal legal standing or procedural input into school-closure and consolidation decisions made by their district center, or is the decision entirely delegated to the state district without municipal or local veto?
content.reduction_path: Obtain and analyze the statute governing district center decision-making authority (likely Government Decree 134/2016 and its procedural regulations); compare against provisions for mandatory local consultation or consent; survey municipalities and district centers on whether closure decisions trigger mandatory stakeholder notice or veto procedures.
